tools.name: mock_send_email
tools.description: Mock: sends an email to one or more recipients.

tools.name: mock_query_database
tools.description: Mock: runs a SQL query against the configured database.

tools.name: mock_http_get
tools.description: Mock: performs an HTTP GET request to a given URL.

tools.name: mock_http_post
tools.description: Mock: performs an HTTP POST request with a JSON body.

tools.name: mock_read_file
tools.description: Mock: reads a file from the configured storage location.

tools.name: mock_write_file
tools.description: Mock: writes content to a file in the configured storage location.

tools.name: mock_create_ticket
tools.description: Mock: creates a support or project ticket in a placeholder system.

tools.name: mock_search_records
tools.description: Mock: searches records in a placeholder data source.
